case_title: CHING SZETO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR JURY, ADVANCED FROM APR-20-2020 TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY AT FEB-03-2020 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. (206)
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-12-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

FOR PLAINTIFF & TIM FAMA, DEPUTY CITY ATTY FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO OCT-17-2019 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-17-2019 IN 206, PLAINTIFF CHING SZETO'S MOTION FOR TRIAL PREFERENCE BASED ON ADVANCED AGE WAS HEARD. FRANK MORELLI, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 02/03/20 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER STIPULATION, WITH A LAST DAY OF 02/14/20. (THE CURRENT JURY TRIAL DATE OF 04/20/20 WILL BE ADVANCED TO 02/03/20.) SEE ORDER, SIGNED IN OPEN COURT, FOR FURTHER DETAILS. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
